Package com.nib.supernaut.commands

package com.nib.supernaut.commands
CICS-like commands API classes.

This package contains standard CICS API commands (e.g., EXEC CICS ...) available to application programs running within the region.

  • Related Packages

    Description
    com.nib.supernaut
    Core implementation of the Supernaut online transaction processing (OLTP) region.
